Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARIE JOSEPHINE GAILLARD
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. However, no allowance has been filed for the creditor claims the administrator has reportedly allowed. [Probate Code Section 9250(b).] Notice to the DHCS is also required if a decedent is the surviving spouse of a person who received health care benefits. [Probate Code Section 9202(a).] Status of filing a petition for final distribution or a second report of status with a petition requesting additional time to administer the estate will be set for 11/18/25. No appearance will be required on that date if a petition is filed by 11/4/25. NB: If the heirs do not waive an accounting, the first two-year accounting is already overdue. [LRSF 14.34 A.] (An order IS proposed until it is signed; there is no need to include "[Proposed]" in the caption. Except for exhibits, each paper filed with the court must bear a footer in the bottom margin of each page, placed below the page number and divided from the rest of the document page by a printed line. [CRC 2.110(a).])

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HARRY LEON WILLIAMS
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 9/2/25. The administrator must file an ex parte petition to amend the 5/7/24 order appointing her, as the date of the decedent's death was missing in that order. If a child survived the decedent, that child's issue are not heirs and should not be listed on Attachment 8 of a petition for probate. Nothing has been filed yet to indicate who the personal representative is for the estate of the post-deceased son. If a petition for final distribution or a petition requesting additional time for estate administration, reporting on the status of administration, is not filed by 8/19/25, an appearance will likely be required on 9/2/25.

rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. None of the documents subject to this compliance hearing has been filed. Please see the appointment order issed on 3/17/2025. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THEODORE C. MCMECHEN SEPARATE PROPERTY TRUST, AS AMENDED AND RESTATED, DATED OCTOBER 12, 2017
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Investment Accounts; Cash Account, And Life Insurance Policy Proceeds As Trust Assets
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 08/19/2025 (no earlier date available). The following issues must be addressed by petitioner: 1) No proposed order has been received or lodged. A copy of the proposed order must be served on each person entitled to notice in a contested matter. Proof of service must be filed. See LRSF 14.7(A)(4). 2) New notice must be given, as the the DE-115 form filed on 05/08/2025 shows the following defects: i) Item 2 (hearing date, time, and dept) was blank. ii) Item 4a of the proof of service was blank. iii) The proof of service was not dated and signed. The name of the person signing the proof of service was not listed either. iv) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) was not attached. 3) If there is no personal representative of the settlor's estate, the settlor's heirs who are not beneficiaries of the trust must be served in the manner required by CCP sections 413.10 et seq. See Probate Code sections 851(b)(3) & 17203(b). 4) Please file a verified supplement to address the following: (i) Paragraph 12 of the petition must include the name and address of the trustee, each heir of the settlor other than the surviving spouse and Mark McMechen, and each successor of the surviving spouse as remainder beneficiaries of undistributed income. (ii) Please provide a copy of the most recent statement of each account sought to be confirmed as an asset of the trust. If no statement is available, please provide other documentation showing how title to each asset was held at the time of the settlor's death. (iii) Please state the date of the settlor's acquisition of each asset sought to be confirmed as an asset of the trust. (iv) Please state whether the settlor's estate was the designated beneficiary of the Metropolitan Life insurance policy. If not, please state the name and address of each designated beneficiary. Please note: Mark McMechen's declaration filed on 06/23/2025 was not verified, as it was not signed in compliance with CCP section 2015.5.
